title: Puerto Banus Private Yacht Hire: Costs, Boats & Tips 2026
html:
Private yacht hire in Puerto Banus offers an unrivalled way to explore the Costa del Sol, with 15-metre motor yachts departing from the main pier often costing from €2,500 for a half-day charter. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own.

How much does it cost to hire a private yacht in Puerto Banus?

Private yacht hire in Puerto Banus typically ranges from €450 for a small motorboat half-day to over €10,000 for a crewed superyacht day charter. Prices vary by boat size, season, and included services. For a benchmark, a 40-foot Fairline motor yacht with skipper costs around €2,500 for eight hours in high season. You can compare options for skippered charters in Puerto Banus on BoatHire24 to find your ideal vessel.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most private yacht charters depart from the main marina in Puerto Banus itself, a glamorous harbour lined with restaurants and designer boutiques. Other popular departure points include the nearby Marbella Marina, just 6 nautical miles east, and the smaller Cabopino Harbour to the west. For longer trips, boats often cruise to the exclusive bay of Marbella or head across to Gibraltar, approximately 40 nautical miles south. Some charters also arrange pick-ups from Estepona, a charming town 20 minutes west by sea.

Which boat to rent for your Puerto Banus charter

Choosing the right boat depends on your group size, budget, and desired experience. Below are four popular options available through BoatHire24.

  1. Small motorboat, ideal for a couple or small group of up to 6 guests; from €450 half-day. The QuickSilver Activ 605 Open is a fine example; view the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open - 150 HP charter page for details.
  2. Medium motor yacht, perfect for 8-10 guests wanting comfort and speed; from €1,800 half-day. Models like the Fairline Phantom 40 are common.
  3. Sailing catamaran, stable and spacious for up to 12 guests, great for families; from €2,500 full-day. Lagoon catamarans are frequently available.
  4. Luxury crewed yacht, for a premium experience with full crew, up to 12 guests; from €5,000 full-day. Sunseeker and Azimut models are popular.
  5. Rib or tender, an adrenaline-fuelled option for up to 6, often used for water sports; from €350 for two hours.

Costs and price bands for Puerto Banus boat hire in 2026

Understanding the price bands helps you plan your budget realistically. Below is a breakdown of typical costs for 2026.

  • Shared group tour (per person): from €80 for a 3-hour trip along the coast.
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): €450, €800, fuel often included.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): €2,500, €4,000, with skipper and basic catering.
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (up to 12 guests): €5,000, €12,000, including gourmet lunch and water toys.

When to go and do you need a licence?

The best season for private yacht hire in Puerto Banus runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind keeps the sea calm. July and August are peak months, with premium pricing and lower availability. Most charters include a skipper, so you do not need a licence for a crewed boat; for bareboat hire you typically need an ICC or equivalent. The operator confirms exact requirements before booking.

For a quieter experience, book a morning departure in June or September; the sea is mirror-flat and the marina is less crowded, giving you the best photo opportunities off the Marbella coastline.

At a glance

  • Price band: €450 to €12,000+ per charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: Half-day (4hrs) or full-day (8hrs)
  • Capacity: Up to 12 guests on most yachts
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence: Not required for skippered charters

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I rent a private yacht in Puerto Banus without a licence?

Yes, you can hire a skippered private yacht without any licence; the skipper handles all navigation and mooring.

What is included in the charter price?

Most prices include the skipper, fuel for the agreed itinerary, basic insurance, and sometimes a welcome pack; catering and water toys are extra on standard packages.

How far in advance should I book for August 2026?

Private charters in high season often book out 4 to 6 weeks ahead, so reserving by early July is wise to secure your preferred boat and date.

Can I dock at a beach for swimming?

Yes, skippers often stop at coves near Cabopino or the dunes of Artola for swimming, where the water is calm and clear.

After exploring the options, if you own a boat and want to rent it out, you can become a host on BoatHire24 to reach thousands of travellers planning their 2026 holidays. The platform makes it easy to list, manage bookings, and earn income from your vessel in Puerto Banus.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
